## 🔥 Savage But Fair Commentary

### The Mathematical Paradox
Your `adaptive-complexity-router` has a complexity score of 13 when it's designed to manage complexity at threshold 5. That's like hiring a consultant to optimize your consultant optimization process.

### The ADHD Command That Needs ADHD Medication
`adhd-evening-reflect` tries to be a therapist, data analyst, and life coach in 437 lines. It's the command equivalent of a 400-page PowerPoint presentation.

### The Clean Code Generator That's Anything But Clean
At 818 lines, your Java clean code generator violates every principle it preaches. It's creating a 50-page manual on how to open a door.
